'''Milko''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] that tried to capture [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. The droid originally threatened to kill Luke, but eventually put down his weapons and begged for mercy after Luke turned the tide with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Luke showed the droid compassion and let him leave in the scout ship that had transported him to Dagobah. Luke thought that this was a test arranged by [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], although he was not sure whether he had passed or failed.

Milko claimed to have a mother on [[Danchian Prime]].
